output.summary: Completed the height chain for equal-height cards by making card wrapper divs fill the stretched swiper-slide

filesModified.purpose: Complete the height chain to enable equal-height cards
changes: This makes the card wrapper divs (.card-post, .card-resource, etc.) fill the stretched swiper-slide
Positioned before the image hover zoom rules for logical grouping

warnings: Pre-existing webpack size warnings (not related to changes)

syncStatus.notes: CSS-only change. No TSX or PHP modifications needed.

testPage.notes: Test page already exists. Fix applies to existing test content.

fixesApplied.description: Complete height chain for equal-height cards
fixesApplied.rootCause: Previous fix removed 'self-start' from swiper-slide (allowing slides to stretch), but the card wrapper divs inside the slides did not have height: 100%, so they collapsed to content height instead of filling the stretched slide.
heightChain: 1. Swiper's .swiper-wrapper uses display: flex with default align-items: stretch
2. .swiper-slide has h-auto! (overrides Swiper's inline pixel height) - allows natural content height
3. Stretch behavior makes all slides equal to tallest slide height
4. NEW: .swiper-slide > * { height: 100%; } makes card wrapper divs fill the slide
5. Card templates already have a.h-full → article.flex.flex-col.h-full → mt-auto on CTA
6. Result: All cards same height, content properly aligned, CTAs at bottom
fixesApplied.verification: Build passed. CSS rule added without modifying shared card template parts.

implementationNotes.scopeDecision: Scoped to .dynamic-content-carousel to avoid affecting other carousel blocks or patterns
implementationNotes.universalSelector: Used .swiper-slide > * (direct child selector) to target all card wrapper types (.card-post, .card-resource, .card-policy, .card-team-member) without needing to enumerate them
implementationNotes.noTemplateChanges: Did NOT modify card template parts as they are shared across blocks. CSS-only solution ensures equal-height only in this carousel context.
implementationNotes.completeChain: The full height chain is now: swiper-slide (stretched by flexbox) → card wrapper (height: 100%) → anchor (h-full) → article (h-full + flex-col) → CTA (mt-auto at bottom)
